target:
# Try specific poker review sites that might have Bodog client screenshots
# pokerpro.com, poker.org, etc.
playwright-cli -s=bodog-search goto "https://www.poker.org/poker-sites/bodog-poker/" 2>&1 &
curl -s --max-time 15 "https://www.gambling.com/online-poker/reviews/bodog" 2>&1 | grep -oP 'https?://[^"]+(?:screenshot|bodog|poker-client)[^"]*\.(jpg|png|gif)' | head -10 &
wait
